31.kj: [phrase] after, (al-) ways, [idiom] certain, [phrase] continually, [phrase] evening, long, (due) season, so (long) as, (even-, evening-, noon-) tide, (meal-), what) time, when.

31.gl: a tree (from its firmness); hence, wood (plural sticks)
31.kj: [phrase] carpenter, gallows, helve, [phrase] pine, plank, staff, stalk, stick, stock, timber, tree, wood.

31.gl: something brought near the altar, i.e. a sacrificial present
